HomePage.heroDescription: Create polished invoices in seconds with a fast, private, browser-based workflow.
HomePage.howItWorksIntro: Build, review, and export your invoice in three simple steps.
HomePage.step1Desc: Organize your business details, client data, and commercial terms in one focused workspace.
HomePage.step2Desc: See your invoice rendered as a premium document with aligned totals and clean hierarchy.
HomePage.step3Desc: Export a crisp PDF that feels ready for clients, procurement teams, and finance ops.
HomePage.benefitsDesc: Global Devis combines polished design, local-first privacy, and real invoicing essentials like tax, discounts, and shipping in one calm workflow.
HomePage.faq1A: Yes. You can create and download invoices without a subscription.
HomePage.faq2A: No. An account is only needed if you want cloud sync with Supabase.
HomePage.faq3A: Your draft data stays in your browser by default, which keeps the core workflow private.
HomePage.faq4A: Yes. The interface is responsive and works on phones, tablets, and desktops.
HomePage.faq5A: The app includes English, Arabic, French, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Italian, Dutch, Turkish, and Russian locales.
HomePage.article1Excerpt: Learn the core sections every professional invoice should include.
HomePage.article2Excerpt: Small changes that help you get paid faster and look more professional.
HomePage.article3Excerpt: Tips for keeping project income predictable as a freelancer or small business.
HomePage.featuresTitle: Everything a premium invoice workspace needs
HomePage.featuresIntro: From live calculations to export-grade output, the workflow is tuned for everyday billing.
HomePage.feature1Desc: Subtotal, discount, tax, shipping, and grand total update instantly as you type.
HomePage.feature2Desc: Designed for multilingual teams with high-quality Arabic and English invoice composition.
HomePage.feature3Desc: Review an aligned, client-ready invoice before exporting a clean PDF.
HomePage.pricingIntro: Start free, then upgrade when you want collaboration and cloud history.
HomePage.pricingStarterDesc: Perfect for solo invoicing and fast PDF exports in the browser.
HomePage.pricingProDesc: Ideal for professionals who want sync, saved history, and a refined billing workflow.

Form.optionalNotes: Optional notes for your client or internal handoff.
Form.workspaceTitle: Build a polished invoice with confidence
Form.workspaceDescription: Shape the commercial details in a calm workspace, then review a paper-like invoice below before exporting a clean PDF.
Form.previewDescription: This area reflects the final document with paper spacing, invoice alignment, and export-ready typography.
Form.previewNotesFallback: Add a short delivery note, payment instruction, or thank-you message here.

Preview.previewDesc: Zoom in, switch to print view, or download your PDF.

History.title: Invoices
History.subtitle: Search, filter, open, or duplicate saved invoices.
History.emptyDesc: Save an invoice from the toolbar and it will appear here.
History.searchPlaceholder: Search by client or invoice number...
History.noMatches: No invoices match the current filters.
